actions.value:
Hi,
 
If you are seeing the "unrecognized ip address" screen on the same device, then it sounds like you may have deleted/reinstalled the Edge app? Is that the case?
 
This IP Validation security feature is designed to prevent unrecognized logins to your account, which includes new devices AND new installs of the Edge app. If somebody finds your username and password, they won't be able to access your account right away. This IP Validation gives you 7+ days to see that there is an unrecognized login attempt so that you can deny their access and protect your funds!
